Video.summary: Hibbs is tempted by a mobster's money when his wife needs surgery to save her eyesight.
Video.title: Who Do You Trust?

Video.summary: When Nick Colette, the hot-headed son of a "retired" mobster Tommy Colette, joins forces with his father, Eastbridge's crime troubles start.
Video.title: Family Business

Video.summary: When the majority of Tony's officers stage a sick-out in the wake of a wage dispute, Eastbridge becomes an open city for crime.
Video.title: Blue Flu

Video.summary: Following the death of his gangster son in a police shootout, mobster Tommy Colette vows to kill Tony Scali himself.
Video.title: Out Of Business

Video.summary: After Tony arrests Stan's murderer and Ross is convicted, he and his family must take refuge
Video.title: The Iceman Cometh

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali and his team of officers pull out all stops as they try to beat the clock in a desperate search for the kidnapper of a very sick baby.
Video.title: The Sharp Pinch

Video.summary: As Tony faces a long recovery from his gunshot wounds, a cop is killed.
Video.title: Against The Wind, Part 1

Video.summary: Tony discovers a family friend working as a prostitute; David is caught pirating cable TV programs.
Video.title: Working Girls

Video.summary: Tony suspects foul play when a member of a commando-like squad of elite prep-school students -- perpetrators of a series of break-in thefts -- disappears.
Video.title: Dead Cadet's Society

Video.summary: One of Tony's men, Danny Nolan, goes ballistic when Joe Lund, the gun-wielding ex-husband of the woman Dan's been seeing, takes her hostage.
Video.title: The Ides Of March

Video.summary: Tony uncovers the shakedown ofa community of illegal immigrants; David wants an earring to impress a girl.
Video.title: Born In The USA

Video.summary: As the search for a cop killer intensifies, Tony begins to doubt his own recovery.
Video.title: Against The Wind, Part 2

Video.summary: Reno's freedom appears within reach when he goes after his nemesis Lt. Dutch Dixon who is wanted for the murder of his own partner.
Video.title: Dutch On The Run

Video.summary: When Reno stands trial for the murder of Buzzy Burrell, his quest for justice is complicated by Lt. Dutch Dixon who plans to insure that Reno never makes it to court alive.
Video.title: The Trial Of Reno Raines

Video.summary: As Reno waits out his pending appeal for murder, he is transfered to Paso Perdido Penitentiary where he finds himself in danger from the prison population as well as the law.
Video.title: Escape

Video.summary: When Reno is saved during a bar fight by a man strongly resembling Elvis Presley, he attempts to track down "the King" to express his thanks as well as satisfy his curiosity.
Video.title: The King And I

Video.summary: Reno goes to the aid of his Karate Master when one of the master's former pupils attacks a San Francisco councilwoman.
Video.title: Black Wind

Video.summary: When Reno goes to New Orleans after cold-blooded murderer, he finds himself the recipient of a "dead man's curse".
Video.title: Way Down Yonder In New Orleans

Image.alt: Way Down Yonder In New Orleans
Way Down Yonder In New Orleans
Way Down Yonder In New Orleans

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy's investigation into the murder of a TV news director leads them to suspect both a prominent reporter and her assistant.
Video.title: If The Shoe Fits

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy pursue a well known romance novelist who they suspect in a string of murders.
Video.title: Passion And The Palm Beach Detectives

Image.alt: Passion And The Palm Beach Detectives
Passion And The Palm Beach Detectives
Passion And The Palm Beach Detectives

Video.summary: A popular actress Tom and Cassy are told to help study for a new film role interferes with their investigation of an immigrant' s murder
Video.title: All The World's A Stage

Video.summary: Cassy's sister witnesses a mob hit and becomes the killer's next target.
Video.title: Blue Collars

Video.summary: Reno saddles up to help when a friend of Bobby's is injured after uncovering a group of cattle rustlers operating through a traveling rodeo.
Video.title: Rustlers' Rodeo

Video.summary: Cassy suspects a jealous wife in the murder of her successful record producer husband.
Video.title: Appearances

Video.summary: When Tom is shot to keep him from testifying in a murder trial, Cassy goes undercover to catch the man who ordered it.
Video.title: Forever

Video.summary: Lipschitz's first love turns up dead after asking him for protection from an aging mobster.
Video.title: Hidden Agenda

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy expose an IRS agent's apparent suicide as murder.
Video.title: Sins Of The Mother
